summary: Usage Tracker desktop app implementation completed. Created full Electron + React + TypeScript application with ZAI API integration, system tray, UI components, and state management. Built successfully but runtime blocked by electron module injection issue where require('electron') returns stub string instead of API object. Documentation updated and committed to git.
current_status: App builds successfully but fails at runtime with electron module injection issue. All components implemented: API service, store, UI, IPC, tray manager. Git repository initialized with 2 commits tracking implementation progress.
next_steps: Fix electron module injection issue to enable runtime execution
Set up git remote and push when ready
Test API integration with live ZAI API key
blockers: Electron module injection: require('electron') returns stub string instead of API object, causing TypeError on app start
